message:
fix(mvcc): record contention metrics on chain-backpressure abort

The chain_pressure abort path was returning early without calling
record_commit(), causing contention metrics to miss abort events.
Move the record_commit call before the return so the EMA tracker
correctly accounts for all commit outcomes including backpressure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
